The two colors (white and yellow) do not constitute meaningful material variety. This meets the anchor criterion but falls short on the choice materials criterion, warranting a 0.5.

spark_curiosity.scorer_notes: The activity area contains only standard balloons in a plain room. Balloons are familiar to children aged 3-5 and the setup includes no hidden, mysterious, or visually striking element beyond the balloons themselves. No curiosity hook is present at the activity zone.
